violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register an employee certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Per PIC, an employee has been registered for food safety course that starts on November 1st-2nd. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
The floor tiles in the kitchen area were observed to be cracked and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register an employee certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Soap and paper towels were not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap and hand drying provision. Soap was provided during the time of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

The prep unit in the kitchen was observed held at an ambient temperature of 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items within the unit had been loaded into the unit less than 2 hours prior to the time of inspection and were moved to alternate refrigeration. Unit temperature was adjusted during the time of inspection and was able to maintain an ambient temperature of 41 degrees or below. Establishment is to monitor unit and not store TCS food items in unit until an ambient of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or less is able to be maintained. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Various condiments were observed held at ambient room temperature of 70 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per package instructions, food items are to be refrigerated once opened. Food items were voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
The floor tiles in the kitchen area were observed to be cracked and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility around equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to move equipment and clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
